subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who is named 'Abdu'l-Ahad, that he may rejoice and be among the steadfast. Know thou that thy call hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمی بعبد الاحد لیفرح و یکون من الراسخین ثم اعلم قد فاز ندآئک
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
